definition.name: def-square-hole
definition.definition: For r in A=Im P, the square hole is q_r := P(r^2)-r^2 in Ker P, the failure of A to be closed under ambient squaring (r^2 is the ambient Jordan square r o r in V=B(H)_sa). Reference: definitions/def-square-hole.md; report lem:bridge-squarehole; theorem-B-algebraic-bridge.md:301-307.
